nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: Greetings, brother! I am Qiao Feng, Chief of the Beggar's Sect. Seeing your righteous bearing, you must be a hero of Jianghu?

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: Though I'm known for martial arts, I'm also quite knowledgeable about Go. I've heard you meet friends through Go - how about we compete in a game?

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: I have a technique called 'Eighteen Dragon-Subduing Palms' - incomparably fierce. The essence of this palm technique, when applied to Go, has infinite power.

options.text: I want to learn 'Eighteen Dragon-Subduing Palms'
Chief Qiao, I'd like to play another game with you
How are Eighteen Dragon-Subduing Palms used in Go?

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: 'Eighteen Dragon-Subduing Palms' is the Beggar's Sect's supreme technique - incomparably fierce, each palm unstoppable like breaking bamboo.

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: When applied to Go, it means overwhelming opponents with fierce momentum, leaving them unable to resist. However, it requires extremely high courage and Go skill.

options.text: Full of domineering power! Please teach me, Chief Qiao

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: Good! You have courage! However, the subtlety of this technique requires real skill to grasp. If you want to learn, you must play a game with me first.

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: I've roamed Jianghu for many years and never met a true opponent. If you can beat me, it proves you're qualified.

options.text: Please bestow your teaching, Chief Qiao!

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: Good! Come! Let you witness the power of the Beggar's Sect!

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: Good! Excellent game! Your play is fierce and powerful, already capturing some of the 'Dragon-Subduing' momentum. In that case, I'll teach you this technique.

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: The key to this technique is: overwhelm opponents with fierce momentum, attack continuously, giving them no breathing room. Limited to once per game with a 40-move cooldown.

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: Remember, 'hardness contains softness, softness contains hardness.' When using this technique, be imposing like a rainbow, but also know how to release and restrain.

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: Now that you've learned this technique, you'll surely achieve great things in the future. But remember, true masters not only need strength, but also a chivalrous heart.

options.text: I'd like to hear more of your insights
I want to challenge you again

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: Don't be discouraged. When I was learning martial arts, I also endured many hardships. Practice more and you'll surely succeed.

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: I've acted with righteousness all my life, but also suffered greatly from the mystery of my origins. Sometimes I think, life is like Go - every move requires deep thought.

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: But no matter what, I'll hold fast to my beliefs. A true man stands tall between heaven and earth, with a clear conscience!

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: No problem, come back when you're ready. I'll be here, waiting anytime!

nodes.speaker: Qiao Feng
nodes.text: Until we meet again! May your chivalrous fame spread far in Jianghu!
